title: MealPlan
description: A single day's meal plan for one user. Contains 1–6 meals, each with 1 or more food items. All calorie and macro totals are computed deterministically from FoodItem values — never set manually or by AI.

user_id.description: References User.id. One plan per user per date.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which this plan applies. Unique per user.

calorie_target.description: Daily calorie target in kcal. Must equal NutritionProfile.calorie_target exactly. Never modified by Agent 5 or AI layer.

meals.description: Ordered list of meals in the day. Each meal_type may appear at most once.

totals.description: Aggregate of all Meal.totals. Computed field — equals SUM(meal.totals for meal in meals). Never stored as a free value.

calorie_gap.description: calorie_target − totals.calories. Positive = under target. Negative = over target. Computed field.

status.description: Plan lifecycle state. Transitions draft → confirmed trigger inventory deduction (Agent 4). No reverse transition in MVP 1.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Set on creation. Immutable.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Updated on status change or meal edit.

Meal.description: One meal within a daily plan.

meal_type.description: Type of meal. Each value may appear at most once per MealPlan.

name.description: Optional display name. Set by Agent 6 (AI Layer) only — purely cosmetic. Must not influence any calculation.

items.description: Food items included in this meal. At least one required.

totals.description: Aggregate of all MealItem macro values in this meal. Computed field — equals SUM(item macros for item in items).

MealItem.description: A single food item with a measured quantity inside a Meal. Macro fields are always computed via NutritionEngine.compute_item_macros() — never set manually.

food_item_id.description: References FoodItem.id. Must exist in the food database.

quantity_g.description: Quantity of the food item in grams to be consumed in this meal.

calories.description: COMPUTED by Agent 2. Formula: (FoodItem.calories_per_100g / 100) * quantity_g. Never set manually.

MacroTotals.description: Aggregated nutritional totals. Used at both Meal and MealPlan level. Always computed — never stored as a free-form value.
